Thakbong: Landform | Settlement | Houses | Gardens | Wolfgang Franke | Bells | Hokkien Cemetery |

Top-Site ID: s113868

Name: 蚵仔寮村, Kezailiao Village, E-a-liao Village,
Type: settlement

s188: Cemetery in the center of village

Name: Cemetery in the center of village, 村子中央的墓地
Type: cemetery, 公墓, 墓地, 墓園, 墳場, site, 墓
ID: s188
Description:
This cemetery was once located at the center of the village. With the prolongation of Zhongzheng Road to the north of Jiazhan Road, the graveyard was removed. Before being removed, the cemetery had some overgrown and abandoned parts, and some better maintained parts. My last visits to this cemetery were in 2012 and 2014 and it is about that time that the cemetery has been removed.
Longitude: 120.25270850000001
Latitude: 22.732944500000002
Location on Google Maps
Location on OpenStreetMap
Event Start End Day Lunar Day Material Technique Agents Description
fieldwork 14:58:37 15:52:31 2008-09-10 2008-08-11 : Sandy Ko-jui YAN:
